text: Being here, I feel an odd mixture of anticipation and curiosity. The architecture and glass walls make me conscious of being observed, as if transparency is both literal and symbolic. Crossing through this threshold into the R+D exhibition, I am struck by the paradox of advancing technology—its promise to connect and innovate often coexists with unease. I sense the presence of potential, but also a subtle anxiety at what is yet unknown or uncontrolled. This place draws my attention to the dual nature of progress: liberating, but also unsettling.
